shopping_198.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent misinterpreted "at the bottom of the page" to mean the bottom of the currently visible screen, rather than the absolute bottom of the entire product listing. The page indicated "Items 1-36 of 331", implying there were many more items beyond the initial view, which would require scrolling to find the true "bottom of the page". The agent did not scroll to load all content before identifying the target item.
shopping_198.REFLECTION: When the objective specifies finding an item "at the bottom of the page" and the page indicates a large number of total items (e.g., "Items 1-36 of 331") but only a subset is initially visible, always scroll down to load all available content to identify the absolute last item. Do not assume the visible bottom of the screen is the true bottom of the page.
